sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54717" key="katapannuxi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπαννῠχίζω</orth>, <sense id="n54717.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pass the night in revelry</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
